description: StackScan lifecycle hooks for auto-resume, output validation, and cost tracking

hooks.command: bash -c 'LATEST=$(ls -t ~/.stackscan/projects/*/progress.json 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then STEPS=$(grep -o "completed" "$LATEST" | wc -l); TOTAL=15; if [ $STEPS -lt $TOTAL ]; then echo "StackScan: Incomplete project found. Use /stackscan to resume, or /stackscan new to start over."; fi; fi'
